0 1
1 0

Output
0 XNOR25 = XNOR(1,0) = 0
1 XNOR36 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
2 XNOR47 = XNOR(1,1) = 1
3 OR-NOT05 = OR(1,NOT(0)) = 1
